overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player driving a futuristic car through a desert highway and off-road terrain. The scene features wind turbines, billboards, and abandoned vehicles in a post-apocalyptic desert landscape with mountains in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane desert highway with wind farm

events.description: futuristic vehicle overtakes on the left lane
slight steering adjustment to follow highway curve

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed on the desert highway, hands on steering wheel

notable_agents.action: futuristic sports car overtaking on the left side

entered.detail: dozens of large wind turbines scattered across the desert hills
metal barrier running along the left side of the road
large advertising billboard with digital display
distant mountain silhouette on the horizon
futuristic car interior with holographic displays and wooden steering wheel

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a futuristic vehicle driving on a paved desert highway. Wind turbines dot the landscape ahead while the car overtakes another vehicle on the left. The dashboard displays holographic interfaces as the driver navigates gentle curves in the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert transition zone between highway and off-road

events.description: vehicle leaves paved highway and enters dirt terrain
steering correction to navigate uneven desert ground

agents.ego_description: steering off the main highway onto desert dirt paths, kicking up dust

entered.detail: derelict white car sitting in the desert sand beside the road

segments.scene_description: The driver turns right off the paved highway onto unpaved desert terrain. The guardrails and billboards disappear from view as the vehicle navigates dirt paths, passing a derelict white car abandoned in the sand. The wind turbines shift to the left side of the frame as the car heads deeper into the desert.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned desert area with derelict vehicles and barriers

events.description: navigating around abandoned pickup truck blocking the path
sharp turn to avoid red and white road barriers

agents.ego_description: maneuvering through desert obstacles and abandoned vehicles at reduced speed

notable_agents.action: abandoned blue and white pickup truck rusting in the desert

entered.detail: red and white striped concrete barriers blocking the path
derelict truck with blue stripe on side, partially buried in sand

segments.scene_description: Driving through rough desert terrain, the vehicle weaves around an abandoned pickup truck and navigates past red and white concrete barriers. The wind turbines now appear on the right side as the car circles through the badlands, kicking up dust clouds on the unpaved surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert badlands approaching mountain foothills

events.description: acceleration on open desert flat toward mountain range

agents.ego_description: speeding across open desert terrain toward distant mountains

entered.detail: tall saguaro cacti scattered across the landscape
small derelict building with solar panels on roof

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle accelerating across open desert flats toward a large mountain range that now dominates the center of the horizon. Joshua trees and saguaro cacti dot the landscape, with an abandoned shack visible to the right. The wind turbines have shifted to the left as the car heads straight toward the mountains.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a structured highway into the rugged, open expanse of a post-apocalyptic desert. It begins inside a futuristic vehicle navigating a paved road, passing wind turbines and overtaking another car while holographic interfaces glow on the dashboard. As the driver steers right off the highway, the paved surface and billboards give way to dusty dirt paths, leading the camera past a derelict white car abandoned in the sand. The scene then shifts deeper into the badlands, weaving around an abandoned pickup truck and concrete barriers while kicking up clouds of dust. Finally, the vehicle accelerates across open flats dotted with Joshua trees and cacti, passing a lonely shack before heading straight toward a massive mountain range dominating the horizon.
